title: libsoup3 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.6.5-6]
- Fix integer overflow in date/time parsing

[3.6.5-5]
- Bump revision number

[3.6.5-4]
- Fix several CVEs
full_text:
[3.6.5-6]
- Fix integer overflow in date/time parsing

[3.6.5-5]
- Bump revision number

[3.6.5-4]
- Fix several CVEs
